content.problemStatement:
You are given a string  SSS  of length NNN.


Count the number of ways of choosing 444 integers L1L_1L1РђІ, R1R_1R1РђІ, L2L_2L2РђІ, R2R_2R2РђІ,  such that :-


 $1$  $\leq$  $L_1$  $\leq$ $R_1$ $\lt$  $L_2$  $\leq$ $R_2$  $\leq $ $N$  
   $R_1- L_1$  $=$ $R_2-L_2$  
  string $T$ $=$ $S[L_1...R_1]$ + $S[L_2...R_2]$ is palindrome


  $[$ $L_1$, $R_1$, $L_2$, $R_2$ $]$ $=$ $[1,1,3,3]$ 
  $[$ $L_1$, $R_1$, $L_2$, $R_2$ $]$ $=$ $[3,3,4,4]$ 
  $[$ $L_1$, $R_1$, $L_2$, $R_2$ $]$ $=$ $[1,1,4,4]$
constraints: the sum of $|S|$ over all test cases does not exceed $500,000$
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains a single integer $T$ denoting the number of test cases. The description of
        T test cases follows.
    Each testcase contains a single string $S$.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print a single line containing one integer, Number of ways to select $4$ integers which satisfy the given property
